name: Excel to s3dgraphy Mapping (AI Data Collection)
description: Maps Excel tabular data to s3dgraphy Graph format. The Graph can then be exported to Extended Matrix GraphML via GraphMLExporter. IMPORTANT: This mapping creates s3dgraphy nodes (StratigraphicNode with attributes), NOT Extended Matrix nodes (which include ParadataNodeGroup). The transformation Excel→s3dgraphy→GraphML involves three different formalizations: (1) Excel: tabular structure for data entry/AI extraction, (2) s3dgraphy: extended graph with 3D nodes + EM concepts, (3) Extended Matrix GraphML: hypergraph with groups for paradata. The GraphMLExporter handles s3dgraphy→GraphML transformation (e.g., extractor/document attributes → ParadataNodeGroup + ExtractorNode + DocumentNode).

ID.description: Unique identifier (US/USM/USV/SF number) for the stratigraphic unit.

TYPE.description: Type of stratigraphic unit: US, USVs, USVn, SF, VSF, USD, serSU, serUSVn, serUSVs, TSU, SE, BR

DESCRIPTION.description: Detailed textual description of the stratigraphic unit.

PERIOD_START.description: Start date of the period (e.g., -753 for Roman Kingdom start).

PERIOD_END.description: End date of the period (e.g., 476 for Roman Empire end).

PHASE.description: Chronological phase within the period (e.g., Imperiale, Repubblicano).

OVERLIES.description: Comma-separated IDs of SUs that this SU lies upon (covers).

OVERLAIN_BY.description: Comma-separated IDs of SUs that rest on top of this SU.

CUTS.description: Comma-separated IDs of SUs that are cut by this SU.

CUT_BY.description: Comma-separated IDs of SUs that cut this SU.

FILLS.description: Comma-separated IDs of SUs that this SU fills.

FILLED_BY.description: Comma-separated IDs of SUs that fill this SU.

ABUTS.description: Comma-separated IDs of SUs that this SU abuts against.

ABUTTED_BY.description: Comma-separated IDs of SUs that abut this SU.

BONDED_TO.description: Comma-separated IDs of SUs physically bonded to this one.

EQUALS.description: Comma-separated IDs of SUs physically equal to this one (same fabric).

EXTRACTOR.description: Who/what extracted this data (e.g., GPT-4, Claude, Manual). STORED AS ATTRIBUTE on StratigraphicNode, NOT as separate node in s3dgraphy Graph. During GraphML export, GraphMLExporter reads this attribute and creates: ParadataNodeGroup → PropertyNode(stratigraphic_definition) → ExtractorNode (paradata family, SVG icon). This is the correct workflow: Excel column → s3dgraphy attribute → Extended Matrix paradata structure.

DOCUMENT.description: Source document reference (e.g., Report_2023.pdf, Field_notes_Day5.pdf). STORED AS ATTRIBUTE on StratigraphicNode, NOT as separate node in s3dgraphy Graph. During GraphML export, GraphMLExporter reads this attribute and creates: ParadataNodeGroup → PropertyNode(stratigraphic_definition) → DocumentNode (paradata family, BPMN Data Object icon). This is the correct workflow: Excel column → s3dgraphy attribute → Extended Matrix paradata structure.
